title: Agent development and AgentOps with BigQuery, ADK, and MCP
summary: Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) provide standardized integration for agents to connect to data sources including BigQuery, Google Maps, and AlloyDB without custom connectors. Agent operations (AgentOps) features enable observability into performance and cost with minimal instrumentation.
writeup: This video covers building agents with Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK) and connecting them to data sources through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). MCP provides standardized integration to BigQuery, Google Maps, and AlloyDB without writing custom connectors. It also addresses AgentOps: observability features that surface agent performance and cost with minimal instrumentation.
